name: Elder Danstan Toel
about: Elder Danstan Toel is a devoted servant of God, serving as an elder at Zimmerman SDA Church. With a heart for pastoral care and youth mentorship, he coordinates prayer cells, leads Bible study groups, and supports the church's spiritual growth initiatives. His passion is to see young people grounded in faith and equipped for service. He is currently pursuing the Master Guide certification to enhance his leadership skills and better serve the youth and children in his community.
mission: “I believe in servant leadership that uplifts others, grounded in prayer and the Word of God. My goal is to nurture a generation that loves Jesus and serves His church with joy and dedication.”
dedication: To God, who called me to shepherd His flock; to my wife and daughter who support my ministry; and to the youth of Zimmerman SDA Church—you are the future of our faith.

items.title: 30‑Day Devotion Challenge
